DECLARATION OF GREGORY R. MICHAEL IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF MICHAEL REITERMANS EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER DIRECTING SERVICE OF SUMMONS BY EMAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 100050188) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REITERMAN, MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-17-2019 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL REITERMAN'S MOTION FOR EXPEDITED DISCOVERY IS GRANTED, GOOD CAUSE APPEARING. PLAINTIFF HAS ESTABLISHED THE PRIMA FACIE ELEMENTS OF HIS CLAIMS FOR DEFAMATION AND RELATED TORTS AND HAS SUFFICIENTLY ESTABLISHED EFFORTS TO OBTAIN THE REQUIRED IDENTIFYING INFORMATION THROUGH LESS INTRUSIVE MEANS, AND TO SERVE NOTICE OF THIS MOTION ON THE INVOLVED PARTIES. UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES PRESENTED, THE MOTION IS GRANTED AND PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE LEAVE PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 2025.210 TO PROCEED WITH DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS TO THE FOLLOWING PARTIES: REDDIT, AND AUTOMATTIC INC. AS THE PREVAILING PARTY, PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A WRITTEN FORM OF THE ORDER RECAPITULATING THIS TENTATIVE RULING, [OTHER DETAILS, IF ANY], AND SHALL BRING A COPY OF THE PROPOSED ORDER TO THE HEARING, IF ANY. IN THE ABSENCE OF A HEARING, THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL TIMELY COMPLY WITH CAL. R. CT. 3.1312. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID M. HELBRAUN CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED (DISC302)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Due To Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FARAH ABID'S MOTION TO DISMISS DUE TO LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION.

Appearances: Krista L. Baughman of Dhillon Law Group Inc. (415.433.1700) for plaintiff and responding party; Arkady Itkin of the Law Office of A. Itkin (415.640.6768) specially appearing for defendant and moving party.

Argued. Plaintiff submits an additional declaration for review. The Court indicates the declaration should be properly filed.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Farah Ali Abid's motion to dismiss is granted. The case is dismissed for lack of personal jurisdiction. See Word minutes for the Court's complete ruling. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Continued To Aug-21-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Continued To Jun-19-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Plaintiff Michael Reiterman For Expedited Discovery
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Krista L. Baughman of the law offices of Dhillon Law Group, Inc. (415-433-1700) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF MICHAEL REITERMAN's Motion For Expedited Discovery is GRANTED, good cause appearing. Plaintiff has established the prima facie elements of his claims for defamation and related torts and has sufficiently established efforts to obtain the required identifying information through less intrusive means, and to serve notice of this motion on the involved parties. Under the circumstances presented, the motion is granted and plaintiff may have leave pursuant to CCP Section 2025.210 to proceed with deposition subpoenas to the following parties: Reddit, and Automattic Inc.

As the prevailing party, plaintiff shall prepare and submit a written form of the order recapitulating this tentative ruling, [other details, if any], and shall bring a copy of the proposed order to the hearing, if any. In the absence of a hearing, the prevailing party shall timely comply with Cal. R. Ct. 3.1312.

Judge Pro Tem: David M. Helbraun Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported (Disc302)
